race.description: Country Mud Here On South Cup Sunday Hcp (C1)
race.comment: MEADOWBROOK (2) led and gave a great sight but found one better over 1250m at Ballina last start. That run followed an eight-week let-up so there should be a bit of improvement to come. Beautifully in after the claim so plenty to like about her prospects. RED SPECTOR (4) wasn't suited dropping back to 1000m at Taree last time out but he did a fine job to rattle home into fourth. Cherry ripe after two runs back and getting out to this distance is the key to his chances. HARAS (6) started favourite and got the job done in good style in a maiden over this trip at Tamworth recently. Lightly raced filly who can improve again and play a significant role. ON MY COMMAND (7) is yet to miss the frame in four career runs. Drops a huge 7kgs on the last run which brings her right into contention.
